title: Decision-conflict detection pass for validate_decisions.py
description: Source-mining audit section B (callimachus 'Review conflicts' precedent, UNEXPLOITED): extend validate_decisions.py (or sibling) with a supersession/contradiction pass over shared/decisions.md — flag decision pairs touching the same subject where neither supersedes the other, and decisions whose supersedes/superseded_by links are one-way or dangling. Report-only (no gate) for the first pass, matching validate_events.py's telemetry-first posture. Reference: repo/callimachus-main review-conflicts pass. Starts after TASK-189 release.
acceptance_criteria: Detects one-way/dangling supersession links and same-subject decision pairs lacking supersession, on fixtures.
Report-only first pass; real decisions.md run included in submission with findings triaged (real conflicts get follow-ups, false positives documented).
Suite green with focused tests wired in.
